Based on my search results, I found that Wolfgang Bermel, Ivano Bertini, Isabella C. Felli, and Roberta Pierattelli are all legitimate researchers who have published together on NMR spectroscopy. However, I could not find a paper with the exact title "Nmr spectroscopy for the structural characterization of natural products" published in Natural Product Reports in 2015. The search results show multiple papers by this author group published in venues like Journal of the American Chemical Society (2009), Journal of Magnetic Resonance, and other journals, but none match the cited title and venue combination. The automated checkers also confirmed this paper was not found in any academic database.

EXPLANATION: No paper with this exact title by these authors in Natural Product Reports 2015 was found in web search results or academic databases, despite the authors being legitimate researchers in NMR spectroscopy.
